title: Create an auth middleware
summary: Builds a middleware file and then wires it into a route module.

explanation.title: Create the auth middleware
explanation.why: Route handlers should not repeat authentication checks.
explanation.impact: Protected handlers can fail fast before business logic runs.

narration.short: This step creates reusable auth middleware.

explanation.title: Import the middleware
explanation.what: Adds the auth middleware import to the projects routes file.
explanation.why: The route module needs access to the shared middleware.

narration.short: Import the new middleware into the route module.
